milestones.title: First Control
milestones.description: Initial Movement: Players gain control of their character for the first time on the beach, following Paimon's instructions to learn basic movement controls.

milestones.title: Unlocking Statue of The Seven
milestones.description: Unlock Map & Elemental Power: Players interact with the first Statue of The Seven at Starfell Lake, unlocking the regional map and obtaining the power of Anemo.

milestones.title: First Combat Encounter
milestones.description: Slime Battle: Players encounter enemies (Slimes) for the first time and complete a combat tutorial using their newly acquired Elemental Skill.

milestones.title: Encountering Dvalin
milestones.description: The Dragon Appears: Players enter Whispering Woods and trigger a cutscene where the dragon Dvalin (Stormterror) interacts with a mysterious bard (Venti), obtaining a Teardrop Crystal afterwards.

milestones.title: Meeting Amber
milestones.description: New Team Member: Players meet Amber, Outrider of the Knights of Favonius, on the way to Mondstadt. She joins the party, unlocking the Archer class and character switching mechanics.

milestones.title: Clearing Hilichurl Camp
milestones.description: Combat Application: Using Amber's bow and the Traveler's Anemo skills, players clear a nearby Hilichurl camp to proceed, demonstrating elemental interactions.

milestones.title: Arrival at Mondstadt
milestones.description: Entering Major City: Players cross the bridge (startling Timmie's pigeons) and enter the gates of Mondstadt, marking the end of the prologue tutorial phase.
